prompts:
Honest intel from SkyBox. The aggregators are all paywalled or broken.

But here's the thing — we're overcomplicating this. The Leviathan (Grok + Gemini) already found us 22 verified comps with real entry URLs in the first conversation. Those are sitting in the playbook. We don't need aggregators at all.

The pivot:

Stop scraping middlemen. Go direct. The comps Grok and Gemini found have real URLs — BIG4, NBL/Mitsubishi, Hisense, Bunnings, Chery, Red Bull. Those are brand sites with real entry forms.

Prompt 12 — Load the verified comps we already have:

The aggregator approach is dead. We already have 22+ verified competitions with real entry URLs from manual research.

Create ~/compfish/seed_verified_comps.py and seed the database with these confirmed competitions:

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from compfish_db import init_db, add_competition

init_db()

verified = [
    ("BIG4 Ford Ranger + Caravan + 365 Nights", 231000, "https://www.big4.com.au/win", "2026-04-13", "vehicles"),
    ("NBL Mitsubishi Outlander (25 prizes)", 101000, "https://www.nbl.com.au/win", "2026-04-06", "vehicles"),
    ("Japan Family Trip for 4 (GPT Centres)", 20000, "https://www.gptgroup.com.au", "2026-04-11", "travel"),
    ("NZ Wellness Retreat for 2", 20000, "https://www.newzealand.com/au/", "2026-04-06", "travel"),
    ("Hisense $10K Electronics (3 winners)", 10000, "https://www.hisense.com.au", "2026-04-30", "electronics"),
    ("Crossray BBQ + Bunnings + RYOBI + YETI", 2920, "https://www.crossray.com.au", "2026-04-05", "home_garden"),
    ("Spear & Jackson Tool Bundles (3x $750)", 2250, "https://www.spearandjackson.com.au", "2026-04-12", "tools"),
    ("Red Bull Sim Racing Rig", 10000, "https://www.redbull.com/au-en/", "2026-07-15", "electronics"),
    ("Hawaii Trip for 2", 8500, "https://www.gohawaii.com/au", "2026-05-21", "travel"),
    ("Uluru Trip for 2 (5-star)", 6000, "https://www.discovercentralaustralia.com", "2026-05-06", "travel"),
    ("Sea World Resort Gold Coast", 5000, "https://www.seaworld.com.au", "2026-05-31", "travel"),
    ("Budget Boost $50K Cash", 50000, "https://www.budgetdirect.com.au", "2026-05-31", "cash"),
    ("Bambu Lab 3D Printer / xTool Laser", 4600, "https://www.bambulab.com", "2026-05-31", "electronics"),
    ("Robotic Lawn Mowers x2", 5000, "https://www.robomow.com.au", "2026-04-30", "home_garden"),
    ("Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphones", 600, "https://www.sony.com.au", "2026-04-22", "electronics"),
    ("Nokta Metal Detector", 1600, "https://www.noktadetectors.com", "2026-04-22", "electronics"),
    ("Perth Comedy Festival Trip", 2700, "https://www.broadsheet.com.au/perth", "2026-04-09", "travel"),
    ("Kogan / FIRST Giveaways (cars/cash)", 100000, "https://www.kogan.com/au/first/", "2026-07-01", "cash"),
    ("Must Have It $4000 (2 winners)", 4000, "https://www.musthaveit.com.au", "2026-09-04", "cash"),
    ("Australian Womens Weekly $20K Holiday", 20000, "https://www.womensweekly.com.au", "2026-04-30", "travel"),
    ("Chery Ute — Name It Win It", 30000, "https://www.cheryaustralia.com.au", "2026-06-01", "vehicles"),
    ("JBL Gaming Setup + Chair + Desk", 3129, "https://www.jbl.com.au", "2026-03-31", "electronics"),
]

for title, value, url, closes, cat in verified:
    comp_id, is_new = add_competition(
        source="manual_verified",
        title=title,
        prize_value=value,
        entry_url=url,
        closes_at=closes,
        category=cat,
        source_url="leviathan_research",
        notes="Verified by Grok+Gemini fleet research March 2026"
    )
    status = "NEW" if is_new else "exists"
    print(f"  {status}: {title} (${value:,})")

from compfish_db import get_stats
s = get_stats()
print(f"\nDB totals: {s['total_comps']} comps, ${s['total_prize_pool']:,.0f} pool")

Run it:
cd ~/compfish && ./venv/bin/python3 seed_verified_comps.py

Then run the recon script on these 22 to find the REAL entry form URLs on each brand site:
./venv/bin/python3 compfish_recon.py

These are real brand websites — no paywall. Report the difficulty breakdown.

That seeds $630K+ in verified prize pool with real brand URLs. The recon will find the actual entry forms on the brand sites. No middleman, no paywall.

The old aussiecomps data can stay in the DB as reference but it's deprioritised. CompFish's value is now: verified comps → real entry forms → auto-fill.
